ast.source: Node text is not a string

ast.name: error
ast.source: Can't call %s on a component that is not yet mounted. This is a no-op, but it might indicate a bug in your application. Instead, assign to `this.state` directly or define a `state = {};` class property with the desired state in the %s component.
ast.target: 无法在尚未挂载的组件上调用 %s。这是一个空操作，但可能表明您的应用程序中存在错误。请改为直接赋值给 `this.state` 或在 %s 组件中定义一个包含所需状态的 `state = {};` 类属性。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Received an unexpected object in getComponentNameFromType(). This is likely a bug in React. Please file an issue.
ast.target: 在 getComponentNameFromType() 中接收到意外的对象。这可能是 React 中的一个错误。请提交 issue。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: `key` is not a prop. Trying to access it will result in `undefined` being returned. If you need to access the same value within the child component, you should pass it as a different prop. (https://react.dev/link/special-props)
ast.target: %s: `key` 不是 prop。尝试访问它将返回 `undefined`。如果您需要在子组件中访问相同的值，应将其作为不同的 prop 传递。(https://react.dev/link/special-props)

ast.name: error
ast.source: Accessing element.ref was removed in React 19. ref is now a regular prop. It will be removed from the JSX Element type in a future release.
ast.target: 在 React 19 中移除了对 element.ref 的访问。ref 现在是一个常规 prop。它将在未来的版本中从 JSX Element 类型中移除。

ast.name: error
ast.source:
lazy: Expected the result of a dynamic import() call. Instead received: %s

Your code should look like: 
  const MyComponent = lazy(() => import('./MyComponent'))

Did you accidentally put curly braces around the import?
ast.target:
lazy: 期望动态 import() 调用的结果。但接收到：%s

您的代码应如下所示：
  const MyComponent = lazy(() => import('./MyComponent'))

您是否不小心在 import 周围加了花括号？

ast.name: error
error
ast.source: This browser does not have a MessageChannel implementation, so enqueuing tasks via await act(async () => ...) will fail. Please file an issue at https://github.com/facebook/react/issues if you encounter this warning.
ast.target: 此浏览器没有 MessageChannel 实现，因此通过 await act(async () => ...) 排队任务将失败。如果您遇到此警告，请在 https://github.com/facebook/react/issues 提交 issue。

ast.name: error
ast.source: You seem to have overlapping act() calls, this is not supported. Be sure to await previous act() calls before making a new one.
ast.target: 您似乎有重叠的 act() 调用，这是不支持的。请确保在发出新的 act() 调用之前 await 之前的 act() 调用。

ast.name: error
ast.source: You called act(async () => ...) without await. This could lead to unexpected testing behaviour, interleaving multiple act calls and mixing their scopes. You should - await act(async () => ...);
ast.target: 您调用了 act(async () => ...) 但没有 await。这可能导致意外的测试行为，交错多个 act 调用并混合它们的作用域。您应该 - await act(async () => ...);

ast.name: error
ast.source:
A component suspended inside an `act` scope, but the `act` call was not awaited. When testing React components that depend on asynchronous data, you must await the result:

await act(() => ...)
ast.target: 一个组件在 `act` 作用域内挂起，但 `act` 调用未被 await。当测试依赖于异步数据的 React 组件时，您必须 await 结果：\n\nawait act(() => ...)

ast.name: error
ast.source: forwardRef requires a render function but received a `memo` component. Instead of forwardRef(memo(...)), use memo(forwardRef(...)).
ast.target: forwardRef 需要一个渲染函数，但接收到一个 `memo` 组件。请使用 memo(forwardRef(...)) 而不是 forwardRef(memo(...))。

ast.name: error
ast.source: forwardRef requires a render function but was given %s.
ast.target: forwardRef 需要一个渲染函数，但接收到 %s。

ast.name: error
ast.source: forwardRef render functions accept exactly two parameters: props and ref. %s
ast.target: forwardRef 渲染函数恰好接受两个参数：props 和 ref。%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: forwardRef render functions do not support defaultProps. Did you accidentally pass a React component?
ast.target: forwardRef 渲染函数不支持 defaultProps。您是否不小心传递了一个 React 组件？

ast.name: error
ast.source: memo: The first argument must be a component. Instead received: %s
ast.target: memo: 第一个参数必须是组件。但接收到：%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: We expected inner Transitions to have transferred the outer types set and that you cannot add to the outer Transition while inside the inner.This is a bug in React.
ast.target: 我们期望内部 Transition 能够传递外部类型集，并且您不能在内部时添加到外部 Transition。这是 React 中的一个错误。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Calling useContext(Context.Consumer) is not supported and will cause bugs. Did you mean to call useContext(Context) instead?
ast.target: 不支持调用 useContext(Context.Consumer)，这会导致错误。您是否想改为调用 useContext(Context)？

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Seems the loaded translations were in flat JSON format instead of nested. Either set keySeparator: false on init or make sure your translations are published in nested format.
ast.target: 看起来加载的翻译文件是扁平的JSON格式，而不是嵌套格式。请在初始化时设置keySeparator: false，或确保您的翻译以嵌套格式发布。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This means something IS WRONG in your setup. You access the t function before i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage was done. Wait for the callback or Promise to resolve before accessing it!!!
ast.target: 这意味着您的设置中存在错误。您在i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage完成之前就访问了t函数。请等待回调或Promise解析后再访问它！！！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: nesting options string contains interpolated variables with escapeValue: false — if any of those values are attacker-controlled they can inject additional nesting options (e.g. redirect lng/ns). Sanitise untrusted input before passing it to t(), or keep escapeValue: true.
ast.target: 嵌套选项字符串包含插值变量且escapeValue: false — 如果这些值中的任何一个由攻击者控制，他们可以注入额外的嵌套选项（例如重定向lng/ns）。在传递给t()之前，请清理不受信任的输入，或保持escapeValue: true。
